title: Demons
overview: A university student asks Akuma Kun to investigate the strange deaths of two of her friends, who both died on the same exact date and time.

title: Gluttony
overview: Hina looks after Ichika, but danger still lurks nearby. Akuma Kun further investigates the case by making another visit to the Asanagi house.

title: Greed
overview: Akuma Kun and Mephisto III get invited to the home of a very wealthy client, who has a disturbing request — to summon Satan for his flesh.

title: Envy
overview: A famous movie director in his twilight years asks Akuma Kun and Mephisto III to find a long-lost, cursed film made by his dear friend.

title: Angel
overview: At his wit's end, a landlord breaks into the apartment of a tenant who stopped paying rent — and discovers a gruesome, seemingly impossible murder.

title: Love and Hate
overview: After arriving in Easter Island to investigate a strange red nail, Akuma Kun and Mephisto III discover the body of a murdered young woman.

title: Human
overview: After years of hard work, a long-time legislator is on the verge of becoming a Cabinet minister. But then, a threatening man pays him a visit.

title: True Intentions
overview: A little boy goes into the Millenarianism Research Institute saying he wants to become a demon, but Akuma Kun immediately throws him out.

title: Father
overview: On a dark and stormy night, a ghastly looking man comes looking for Sanae. He turns out to be her husband, who's been missing for five years.

title: Celebration
overview: While trying out the pancakes at a new neighborhood restaurant, Mephisto III and Akuma Kun remember the day they first met.

title: Play
overview: When Shingo — aka the first Akuma Kun — is sealed away, the father and son Mephistos set out to rescue him, while Akuma Kun takes a different approach.

title: Sacrifice
overview: Akuma Kun, Gremory and Mephisto III enter the barrier to save Shingo. But first, they'll have to confront Strophaia, an old enemy from Ichiro's past.
